title: cyperus metzii
intro: Cyperus metzii, also known as the Chinese flat sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus metzii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Cyperus metzii is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
